environment.note: Single local container; medians of five runs for most workloads. Synthetic microbenchmark, not a production load test.

text_scan_ms.caveat: The Go implementation used regexp.FindAllStringIndex, which allocates a complete result set; this is not an optimized production scanner.

go_warm_build.caveat: Cold standard-library cache initialization in this container was abnormally slow and excluded from the warm-build figure.
